name: Financial Support Scheme
benefit_description: ﻿ S. No. Family income (in ₹) per annum Fee waiver (percentage) Remarks Category 1 Less than or equal to ₹ 4,00,000/ Up to 100% Actual fee or up to a maximum of ₹ 10,000/- Category 2 Between ₹ 4,00,000/- and ₹ 8,00,000/- Up to 50% Actual fee or up to a maximum of ₹ 8,000/- ﻿
details: “Financial Support Scheme” implemented by the Delhi University aims to provide equity and access to quality education to the economically weak students. This scheme also provides financial support for such students which will include fee waiver of all components of fee paid by students (except examination fee & hostel fee). ﻿
eligibility_text: Should be a bonafide student. The student should be studying in any UG/ PG Degree program at a Department/ Institution/Centre of University of Delhi. Family income of the student’s should be less than ₹ 8,00,000/-. ﻿
